summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of the legendary 2/13/70 show, highlighted by an all‑time Dark Star, The Other One and Lovelight.
review: The Miller‑fixed SBD transfer is praised as crisp, strong and virtually flawless, making this one of the best‑sounding releases of the era. Musically the concert is repeatedly called “quintessential” – the extended Dark Star, a monster The Other One, soaring Lovelight and a fiery Smokestack Lightning are cited as top‑tier performances that cement this show among the Dead’s all‑time greats.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly positive reviews (19 of 22 are 5‑star) praise both the performance and the Miller soundboard transfer; only a few lower ratings exist, yielding an average ~4.6.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Miller’s fix is described as crisp, strong and “most excellent”; no drop‑outs or major flaws are reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Three‑set concert with a celebrated electric second set that flows through extended jams; the acoustic first set and closing numbers are also praised for energy and tightness.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work receives high praise, especially on Dark Star and The Other One.
